overall.description: Static first-person view from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a high-rise apartment interior during a hazy golden hour sunset. The room features a platform bed, large slatted windows overlooking a burning cityscape, and a wall-mounted television cycling through various futuristic advertisements and news programs.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with entertainment area

agents.ego_description: stationary in the apartment, observing the television and the hazy cityscape visible through the windows

entered.detail: low platform bed with white sheets and scattered magazines or books
large windows with horizontal blinds revealing orange hazy sky and fires outside
flatscreen TV displaying various cycling advertisements and news programs
ceiling with parallel wooden slats creating striped pattern
glowing cyan holographic interface on the wall showing abstract graphics
magazines, papers, and personal items scattered on the bed surface

segments.scene_description: A static view of a cyberpunk apartment bedroom during a hazy sunset. The room features a platform bed in the foreground, large windows showing a burning cityscape outside, and a television on the right wall continuously cycling through futuristic advertisements and news broadcasts. The wooden slat ceiling and warm orange lighting create a cozy yet dystopian atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a cyberpunk bedroom, capturing the atmospheric tension between a cozy interior and a chaotic city. It begins with a view of a platform bed in the foreground, framed by the warm orange glow of a hazy sunset. As the eye wanders, the scene expands toward large slatted windows that reveal a burning cityscape outside, contrasting the domestic stillness with urban destruction. The focus then shifts toward the right wall, where a television continuously cycles through futuristic advertisements and news broadcasts under a wooden slat ceiling.
